scripts.check:jobtypes: node -e "const { JobType } = require('@prisma/client'); const fs=require('fs'); const prisma=Object.values(JobType).sort(); const txt=fs.readFileSync('src/lib/jobs/jobTypes.ts','utf8'); const local=[...new Set([...txt.matchAll(/:\\s*\\\"([A-Z0-9_]+)\\\"/g)].map(x=>x[1]))].sort(); const missing=prisma.filter(x=>!local.includes(x)); const extra=local.filter(x=>!prisma.includes(x)); if(missing.length||extra.length){ console.error(JSON.stringify({missing,extra},null,2)); process.exit(1);} console.log('ok');"
scripts.prisma:migrate:pg:dev: cross-env PRISMA_MIGRATIONS_PATH=prisma_pg prisma migrate dev --schema=prisma_pg/schema.prisma --name init_pg --create-only
